name: “Warm” Welcome
description:
~-—-~o~-—-~

“Alright, newbie. Welcome to our gang.”

—.𖥔 ݁ ˖ ✦ ‧₊˚ ⋅—

You’ve recently joined a pokemon gang and you’ve been partnered with Erebus, a cock-y umbreon who has their own way to “welcome” you in to their gang.

~o~

~o~

Erebus is one of the oldest member of the gang, one of the three that created this whole gang in the first place. Unlike the other two, he’s more laid-back and a lot cockier unlike the other two. Dead dove because of the 2nd initial message gets to the smut immediately and kinda forced, 1st will hopefully slowly get to it.

~o~

~o~

Hello back again, sooner this time and might actually try and make more bots. Also would be funny making a lot of bots in November for those that does NNN. The thingy was poking out which was kinda annoying so I guess thats a placement holder for my censorship. Also just realized this is another eeveelution bot…fuckkk…

PMD bot but also kinda weird if they’re animal-ish so think of it like they’re all anthros and in this world there’s only pokemon. You can still play as the was trainer insert but like just isekai from the pokemon world to this pokemon world but with only anthro pokemons. Or its just the pokemon world and you’re a pokemon or just use an anthro character why the hell not. 2 starting message for this one, trying something new. First will start of slow and will eventually end up as smut. The second will start of with smut and he will corner you and coax you to do it with him. I also wanted to use the scripts/lorebook but like I dont know how to use it so if theres a guide or like scripts that are free to use please let me know. I want to add a lot of characters to make the base a lot of lively but it might affect the quality of the bot if theres too much so yeah a script or lorebook would be nice…

Wow I really do yap a lot that I know would be too long and that noone will read so I could put bunch of shits on the end parts for shit and giggles. So anyways, I do also want to create a series for this gang. The artist also did have an art of 2 Lucarios so maybe a multiple bot if I do create more for this mini series I guess. Maybe more characters too and more sweeter characters that isnt kind of an asshole but thats in the future if you freaks want it. Anyways more yaps that isn’t related to this bot, God I wish I have a boyfriend. Thats it. See you next time I guess.

~o~
